name: Henderson Chambers
abstract: Henderson Chambers (May 1, 1908 – October 19, 1967) was an American jazz trombonist.

about_quotes.speaker: Louis Armstrong and Herman Chittison
about_quotes.evidence: Henderson Chambers. Yeah. Uh, either Roberts. Or either Roberts. Yeah. Do you know the first name of Roberts? I don't know, Roberts. George Robinson. George Robertson. Robinson. Robinson. Robinson. Oh, B-I-N-S-O-N. S-O-N. George Robinson. Uh-huh. And George Derigaki, I believe it was. George Derrico
about_quotes.doc_title: Louis Armstrong and Herman Chittison Interview, 1960-05-04

about_quotes.speaker: William Randolph "Cozy" Cole
about_quotes.evidence: The interviewer mentions Henderson Chambers in the context of a band lineup (Barney Bigard, Chambers on trombone), but the interviewee (Cozy Cole) does not respond or provide any personal anecdote or confirmation of a direct relationship.

about_quotes.speaker: Ernie Fields
about_quotes.evidence: he said, you know what it is Chambers, that session, you did that session.
